name: Vegetables in a Yoghurt and Coconut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 100 g Green beans, cut into 1 cm pieces
50 g Carrots, diced into 5 mm cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables, chilli powder, turmeric, salt and water in a large saucepan and bring to the boil.
2. Simmer for about 20 minutes until the vegetables are tender. Remove from heat.
3. Whisk the yoghurt, green chillies, coriander and coconut together and set aside.
4. In a large saucepan, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
5. Add the mustard seeds and curry leaves, and after 5-6 seconds, add the vegetables with the liquid. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
6. Lower the heat and add the yoghurt mixture, stirring occasionally. Cook for a further 4-5 minutes.
7. Serve with rice.
